mapper.update: INSERT INTO xray_client_traffic (id, client_id, server_id, uplink_bytes, downlink_bytes, last_counter_uplink, last_counter_downlink, last_sampled_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{clientId}, #{serverId}, 0, 0, #{curUp}, #{curDown}, #{sampledAt}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE uplink_bytes = 0, downlink_bytes = 0, /* 新基线设成当前值 (而不是 0), 防下一轮采样把"重置前的余量"误算成新增量 */ last_counter_uplink = VALUES(last_counter_uplink), last_counter_downlink = VALUES(last_counter_downlink), last_sampled_at = VALUES(last_sampled_at)
